name: Viasat, Inc.
description: Viasat, Inc. is a global communications company that believes everyone and everything in the world can be connected. For more than 35 years, Viasat has helped shape how consumers, businesses, governments and militaries around the world communicate. Today, the company is developing the ultimate global communications network to power high-quality, secure, affordable, fast connections to impact people's lives anywhere they are—on the ground, in the air or at sea. Viasat provides high-speed satellite broadband services and secure networking systems for military and commercial markets.
